name: @mxdx/core
description: WASM bindings and shared modules for mxdx fleet management

scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build ../../crates/mxdx-core-wasm --target nodejs --out-dir ../../packages/core/wasm/nodejs && wasm-pack build ../../crates/mxdx-core-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../packages/core/wasm/web
scripts.prepack: [ -f wasm/nodejs/mxdx_core_wasm.js ] || npm run build:wasm; rm -f wasm/nodejs/.gitignore wasm/nodejs/package.json wasm/web/.gitignore wasm/web/package.json
